headline: Smart Traffic Saves KL Commuters 8 Minutes on Average
context: DBKL smart traffic at 850 intersections reduced average KL journey times by 8 minutes during peak hours.

cards.big: Smart traffic at 850 KL intersections saves commuters 8 minutes average
cards.sub: Adaptive signal control cost RM380 million covering 35% of city intersections

cards.big: System processes data from 4,200 cameras and 12,000 road sensors real time
cards.sub: Signal adjustments occur every 90 seconds based on traffic flow analysis

cards.big: Full deployment to all 2,400 intersections would cost RM850 million more
cards.sub: Estimated savings of RM2.8 billion annually at full deployment

cards.big: System reduced accidents at equipped intersections by 15% in first year
cards.sub: Better coordination and countdown timers contributed to safety improvement

cards.big: Smart traffic tests whether technology investment at scale delivers proportional returns
8 minutes average savings per commuter from smart traffic. Scale determines whether pilots become systems.
